overall.description: First-person underwater exploration gameplay from Subnautica. The player swims through an alien ocean environment, transitioning from a dark deep area with crimson bioluminescent seagrass to a sunlit kelp forest with tall underwater vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep ocean seabed with bioluminescent crimson grass

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily over the crimson seagrass bed with the flashlight illuminating the dark seabed

entered.detail: vast field of red bioluminescent grass covering the dark seabed
large rock formation rising from the seafloor in the distance
murky deep water with limited visibility

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a deep, dark underwater environment. The seabed is covered in crimson bioluminescent seagrass that glows faintly in the darkness. Rocky outcrops are visible in the distance as the player explores the ocean floor with a flashlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallowing ocean water approaching kelp forest

events.description: ocean surface becomes visible overhead as water transitions from dark to green
tall kelp stalks appear on the horizon as the player approaches the forest edge

agents.ego_description: swimming upward toward the surface while approaching the distant kelp forest

entered.detail: rippling water surface with sunlight filtering through from above
tall underwater vegetation visible in the green distance
brighter green water indicating shallower depth

segments.scene_description: The player ascends through the water column as the environment brightens. The ocean surface becomes visible overhead, casting a green tint to the water. In the distance, tall kelp stalks mark the edge of an underwater forest while the crimson seagrass falls away below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense underwater kelp forest with tall vertical vegetation

events.description: entering dense kelp forest with closely spaced tall stalks surrounding the player
school of small fish swims through the kelp forest

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense kelp forest, swimming between tall stalks and observing marine life

notable_agents.action: school of small silver fish swimming in a coordinated group through the kelp

entered.detail: coordinated group of small silver fish swimming through the vegetation
dense overhead layer of kelp fronds near the water surface

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a dense kelp forest with towering stalks rising toward the sunlit surface. The vegetation creates a semi-enclosed environment with dappled light filtering through. A school of small fish swims past as the player navigates between the thick kelp stalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater ascent from a dark, bioluminescent abyss into a vibrant, sun-drenched kelp forest. It begins on the deep ocean floor, where a flashlight illuminates rocky outcrops and fields of glowing crimson seagrass. As the camera swims upward, the oppressive darkness gives way to a brightening green tint as the ocean surface becomes visible overhead and the red vegetation recedes below. The scene then opens into a dense forest of towering kelp stalks that rise toward the light, creating a semi-enclosed space of dappled sunlight. Finally, the camera navigates through the thick vegetation as a school of small fish swims past in the shimmering water.
